testcase.name: handleAgentComplete_approvalRequired_PutsAgentInAwaitingApprovalState
testcase.error: java.lang.IllegalStateException: Transaction synchronization is not active at org.springframework.transaction.support.TransactionSynchronizationManager.registerSynchronization(TransactionSynchronizationManager.java:277) at com.aidevplatform.service.AgentOrchestrator.handleAgentComplete(AgentOrchestrator.java:197) at com.aidevplatform.service.AgentOrchestratorTest.handleAgentComplete_approvalRequired_PutsAgentInAwaitingApprovalState(AgentOrchestratorTest.java:386) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596)
